author: Star Wars YouTube
text:
Obi-Wan Kenobi VS Jango Fett Space Chase Battle | Star Wars: Attack of the Clones | Official Clip
Obi-Wan Kenobi chases Jango and Boba Fett through the asteroid ring over Geonosis.
